pr-evidence/databricks-probe-fixture-tar.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found relative fixture aliasing and unsupported URI scheme risks; both were fixed with exact derived URI validation, supported-scheme checks, and focused regression tests.
what_changed: Databricks engine-probe targets and runner scripts now support deterministic Qwen3 fixture generation before native probes.
pr-evidence/databricks-probe-fixture-tar.why: Benchmark-plan engine probe target files need to be self-sufficient on Databricks when handoff/payload fixtures are generated by the job itself.
